ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported statistics */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases reported */,
  "total_cured" INTEGER /* Total cured cases reported */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths reported */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Active cases calculated as total_confirmed - total_cured - total_deaths */,
  "recovery_rate" TEXT /* Recovery rate calculated as total_cured / total_confirmed */,
  "fatality_rate" TEXT /* Fatality rate calculated as total_deaths / total_confirmed */,
  "test_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "test_positive_rate" TEXT /* Test positive rate calculated as total_confirmed / test_conducted */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_entry_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered the data */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was entered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_data_entry_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_entry_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state or union territory */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinate of the state or union territory */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinate of the state or union territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data entry, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, update data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases reported in the report */,
  "total_cured" INTEGER /* Total cured cases reported in the report */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths reported in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, report available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded historical data */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases recorded */,
  "total_cured" INTEGER /* Total cured cases recorded */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government report, research study) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding data entry */,
  "quality_score" TEXT /* Quality score of the data (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about data quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
